commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR classifies selected embedded agent provider-denial error payloads through the shared failover matcher, adds CE-011/current-ak auth matching, preserves guarded non-fallback cases, and covers fallback progression in tests.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +166. Total +200 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible: a non-GPT embedded result whose only signal is CE-011/CJK denial isError text returns null from the classifier, and the fallback wrapper treats null classification as candidate success.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the automerge PR already contains the focused fix and now needs exact-head CI/automerge gates plus maintainer acceptance of the surfaced risk.
